scenarios.title: completes a credit-card checkout for the updated cart item @positive
scenarios.userAction: Visit the cart page, update the second item's quantity to 3, proceed to checkout, enter card details, click Pay now, and verify the order-confirmation page.
expectedAssertions: cart rows are visible with expected count after page load
quantity input retains value '3' after clicking Update cart (Q13 guard)

scenarios.title: keeps the Checkout button disabled after all cart items are removed @negative
scenarios.userAction: Visit the cart page, remove every item one by one, and verify the empty-cart banner appears and the Checkout button is semantically disabled.
expectedAssertions: empty-cart banner is visible after all items removed
Checkout button toBeDisabled() (semantic, not CSS-class check)

locatorTable.notes: No DOM snapshot; .cart-row CSS class may not correspond to data-testid="cart-row". Fallback: this.page.locator('.cart-row'). See pin 1.
qty-input label unknown; spinbutton role assumes <input type="number">. Fallback: getByRole('textbox') or locator('.qty-input'). See pin 2.
cy.contains suggests text is visible; assuming <button> element. Could be <a> or <div role="button">. See pin 3.
Assuming <button>. Anchored regex avoids matching 'Proceed to checkout' variants. Also used for toBeDisabled() assertion. See pin 4.
Label text for card input unknown. If payment form is in an iframe, requires frameLocator. See pin 5.
Label text unknown; regex covers common variants. Same iframe caveat as pin 5. See pin 6.
Label text unknown; regex covers common variants. Same iframe caveat. See pin 7.
Element is explicitly <button>; accessible name inferred from class .pay-now. See pin 8.

cy.contains suggests prominent label; assuming heading element. Could be

or

. See pin 9.
CSS class may not map to a data-testid. Fallback: locator('.summary-total'). See pin 10.
Button accessible name inferred from class .remove-btn. Actual label may differ. See pin 11.
CSS class .empty-cart-banner does not guarantee role="status". Could be role="alert" or plain <div>. See pin 12.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q1 unresolved: cart-row testid absent, CSS fallback
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Ask FE team to add data-testid="cart-row" to every cart row element, or switch to locator('.cart-row') if testid not available.

hallucinationDefensePins.elementDescription: Quantity input for a named cart row
hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q2 unresolved: qty input label unknown, spinbutton fallback
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Confirm input type (number vs text) and whether a visible label is associated; switch to getByRole('textbox') or getByLabel if needed.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q3 unresolved: Update cart element role unknown
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Inspect element type; if not <button>, switch to getByText(/update cart/i) or getByRole('link', ...).

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q4 unresolved: Checkout element role unknown; toBeDisabled() requires HTML disabled or aria-disabled attr
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: If element is <a>, switch to getByRole('link', ...) and confirm aria-disabled attribute is set when cart is empty.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q5 unresolved: payment form may be in iframe; label text and frame selector unconfirmed
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: If payment form is inside an iframe, wrap as page.frameLocator('iframe[name*="card"]').getByLabel(/card number/i) and confirm accessible label text.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q5 unresolved: expiry label unknown, iframe possible
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Same as pin 5 — confirm label text and iframe presence.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q5 unresolved: CVC label unknown, iframe possible
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Same as pin 5 — confirm label text and iframe presence.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q6 unresolved: pay-now button accessible name unknown, inferred from CSS class
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Inspect rendered button text; update regex if label is 'Place order', 'Complete payment', etc.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q7 unresolved: Order confirmed element type unknown, heading assumed
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: If not a heading element, switch to getByText(/order confirmed/i).

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q8 unresolved: summary-total testid absent, CSS fallback
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Ask FE team to add data-testid="summary-total", or fall back to locator('.summary-total').

hallucinationDefensePins.elementDescription: Remove button for a named cart row
hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q9 unresolved: remove-button accessible name inferred from class
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Inspect button text or aria-label; update regex if accessible name differs from /remove/i.

hallucinationDefensePins.whyComment: Q10 unresolved: empty-cart-banner ARIA role unknown
hallucinationDefensePins.reviewerFallback: Try getByRole('alert') if role='status' not found; otherwise use getByTestId('empty-cart-banner') or locator('.empty-cart-banner').
